login.title: Sign In
login.signupLink: Don't have an account? Sign Up
login.resetSuccessMessage: Password changed. Please sign in with your new password.

resend.description: If you haven't verified {email} yet, you can send a new verification email.
resend.success: A new verification email has been sent. Please check your inbox.
resend.error: Failed to resend the verification email.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.errorMessage: Request failed. Please try again later.
forgotPassword.sentDescription: We sent a reset link to your inbox. (valid for 30 minutes)

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.loginLink: Already have an account? Sign In
signup.verifyDescription: We sent a verification link to {email}. Please check your inbox and click the link.

resend.success: A new verification email has been sent. Please check your inbox.
resend.error: Failed to resend the verification email.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.invalidDescription: The password reset link has expired or is invalid.

success.title: Email Verified
success.description: Your email has been successfully verified.

error.title: Verification Failed
error.description: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

withdraw.dialogDescription: Your account and all data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
withdraw.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
